architecture.agent_1: Document Extractor (gpt-4.1-nano) — reads ANY document, extracts structured data
architecture.agent_2: Classification Prompt Generator (gpt-4.1-mini) — generates optimal via negativa prompt from document context + exclusion list
architecture.agent_3: Streaming Pipeline Classifier (gpt-4o-mini) — classifies each company using Agent #2 prompt
architecture.role_selector: GPT-powered role selection (gpt-4o-mini) — matches candidates against document target roles, CRO disambiguation
